projectDescription: A Minecraft 1.21.1 mod adding alpine-themed content including new wildlife, Arolla Pine furniture, stone blocks, winter decorations, and revitalized snowy biomes for both Fabric and NeoForge.
keyFeatures: Rideable Reindeer that support two passengers simultaneously
Alpine Sheep with unique homespun wool and bread-on-a-stick riding mechanic
Full Arolla Pine wood set with furniture: chairs, tables, sofas, beds, cabinets, bathtub, wardrobe, and more
Alpine Gneiss stone family with frost/snow-covered variants
Winter decorations: icicles, wreaths, garlands, fairy lights, snow globe, tree baubles, star topper
New foods: raw/cooked reindeer and cooked reindeer dish
Revitalized snowy biomes with hoarfrost grass, frozen dirt, and alpine flora
Dual mod-loader support for Fabric and NeoForge (Minecraft 1.21.1)
publicApiSurface: net.satisfy.alpinewhispers.core.registry.EntityTypeRegistry — Reindeer and Alpine Sheep entity types
net.satisfy.alpinewhispers.core.block.FireplaceCorniceBlock — decorative fireplace insert accepting full blocks
net.satisfy.alpinewhispers.core.world.feature — Arolla Pine tree grower and Rock Pile feature
